testcase.name: test_convert_with_payment_type

failure.message: AssertionError: Payment type not carried over: riba, 30gg assert ('RB30' in 'riba' or 'Ri.Ba' in '30gg') + where 'riba' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d4a4cd40>('payment_method', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d4a4cd40> = {'client_id': 'cli_34249cd3e9f2', 'client_name': 'TEST_Cliente Preventivo V2', 'converted_from': 'prev_837c7157da', 'converted_to': None, ...}.get + and '30gg' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d4a4cd40>('payment_terms', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d4a4cd40> = {'client_id': 'cli_34249cd3e9f2', 'client_name': 'TEST_Cliente Preventivo V2', 'converted_from': 'prev_837c7157da', 'converted_to': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_preventivi_v2.py:669: in test_convert_with_payment_type assert 'RB30' in invoice.get('payment_method', '') or 'Ri.Ba' in invoice.get('payment_terms', ''), f"Payment type not carried over: {invoice.get('payment_method')}, {invoice.get('payment_terms')}" E AssertionError: Payment type not carried over: riba, 30gg E assert ('RB30' in 'riba' or 'Ri.Ba' in '30gg') E + where 'riba' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d4a4cd40>('payment_method', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d4a4cd40> = {'client_id': 'cli_34249cd3e9f2', 'client_name': 'TEST_Cliente Preventivo V2', 'converted_from': 'prev_837c7157da', 'converted_to': None, ...}.get E + and '30gg' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d4a4cd40>('payment_terms', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d4a4cd40> = {'client_id': 'cli_34249cd3e9f2', 'client_name': 'TEST_Cliente Preventivo V2', 'converted_from': 'prev_837c7157da', 'converted_to': None, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_convert_with_global_discount

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected taxable~180, got None assert 180.0 < 1 + where 180.0 = abs((0 - 180.0)) + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d48d3040>('taxable_amount', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d48d3040> = {'cassa': 0.0, 'ritenuta': 0.0, 'rivalsa_inps': 0.0, 'subtotal': 200.0, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_preventivi_v2.py:711: in test_convert_with_global_discount assert abs(inv_totals.get('taxable_amount', 0) - 180.00) < 1, f"Expected taxable~180, got {inv_totals.get('taxable_amount')}" E AssertionError: Expected taxable~180, got None E assert 180.0 < 1 E + where 180.0 = abs((0 - 180.0)) E + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d48d3040>('taxable_amount', 0) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc46d48d3040> = {'cassa': 0.0, 'ritenuta': 0.0, 'rivalsa_inps': 0.0, 'subtotal': 200.0, ...}.get
